translations.en: Tell me which one you prefer.
translations.de: Sag mir, welches dir besser gefällt.
translations.zh-Hans: 告诉我你更喜欢哪一个。
translations.yue: 話畀我知你鍾意邊件多啲。
translations.vi: Cho tôi biết bạn thích cái nào hơn.
translations.nl: Zeg me welke je het liefst hebt.
translations.hi: मुझे बताओ, तुम्हें कौन सा ज़्यादा पसंद है।
translations.nb: Si meg hvilken du liker best.
translations.id: Beri tahu aku mana yang kamu lebih suka.
translations.sv: Säg vilken du tycker bäst om.
translations.cs: Řekni mi, který se ti víc líbí.
translations.da: Fortæl mig, hvilken du bedst kan lide.
translations.ja: どっちが好きか教えて。

tokens.explanation: Imperative 2nd person singular form of the verb 'dire'.
Tonic personal pronoun (1st person singular), enclitic after the imperative meaning 'to me'.
Interrogative pronoun (masculine singular) selecting among a set.
Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Present indicative, 2nd person singular of 'préférer'.

sentences.target: On ne sait pas lequel choisir.

translations.fr: On ne sait pas lequel choisir.
translations.en: We don't know which one to choose.
translations.de: Wir wissen nicht, welches wir nehmen sollen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们不知道该选哪一个。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi không biết nên chọn cái nào.
translations.nl: We weten niet welke we moeten kiezen.
translations.hi: हमें नहीं पता कि कौन सा चुनें।
translations.nb: Vi vet ikke hvilken vi skal velge.
translations.id: Kami tidak tahu harus memilih yang mana.
translations.sv: Vi vet inte vilken vi ska välja.
translations.ro: Nu știm pe care să-l alegem.
translations.da: Vi ved ikke, hvilken vi skal vælge.
translations.ja: どれを選べばいいかわからない。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used for generic 'one' or colloquial 'we'.
First element of discontinuous negation 'ne ... pas'.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular of 'savoir'.
Negative adverb completing the negation with 'ne'.
Interrogative pronoun (masculine singular) as the object of 'choisir'.
Infinitive verb serving as the complement of 'sait'.

sentences.target: Dis-moi lequel tu prends avec ce café.
sentences.reading: /di mwa lə.kɛl ty pʁɑ̃ a.vɛk sə ka.fe/

translations.fr: Dis-moi lequel tu prends avec ce café.
translations.ipa: /di mwa lə.kɛl ty pʁɑ̃ a.vɛk sə ka.fe/
translations.en: Which one are you having with this coffee.
translations.es: Dime cuál vas a tomar con este café.
translations.de: Sag mir, welches du zu diesem Kaffee nimmst.
translations.it: Dimmi quale prendi con questo caffè.
translations.ko: 이 커피랑 같이 어떤 걸 먹을지 말해줘.
translations.zh-Hans: 告诉我这杯咖啡你要搭配哪一个。
translations.yue: 話畀我知你會揀邊件配呢杯咖啡。
translations.ru: Скажи, какой ты возьмёшь к этому кофе.
translations.pt: Diz-me qual vais pedir com este café.
translations.he: תגיד לי איזה אתה לוקח עם הקפה הזה.
translations.vi: Cho tôi biết bạn sẽ dùng cái nào với ly cà phê này.
translations.ar: قل لي أي واحد ستأخذ مع هذه القهوة.
translations.nl: Zeg me welke je bij deze koffie neemt.
translations.uk: Скажи, який ти візьмеш до цієї кави.
translations.hu: Mondd meg, melyiket választasz ehhez a kávéhoz.
translations.hi: मुझे बताओ, इस कॉफ़ी के साथ तुम कौन सा लोगे।
translations.pl: Powiedz mi, który weźmiesz do tej kawy.
translations.el: Πες μου ποιο θα πάρεις με αυτόν τον καφέ.
translations.nb: Si meg hvilken du vil ha til denne kaffen.
translations.id: Beri tahu aku mana yang akan kamu ambil dengan kopi ini.
translations.sv: Säg vilken du tar till det här kaffet.
translations.ro: Spune-mi pe care îl iei cu această cafea.
translations.cs: Řekni mi, který si dáš k téhle kávě.
translations.da: Fortæl mig, hvilken du tager til den her kaffe.
translations.fi: Kerro, kumman otat tämän kahvin kanssa.
translations.ja: このコーヒーに合わせてどれにするか教えて。

tokens.explanation: Imperative 2nd person singular of 'dire'.
Tonic personal pronoun (1st person singular), enclitic indirect object of the imperative.
Interrogative pronoun (masculine singular) introducing a choice.
Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Present indicative, 2nd person singular of 'prendre'.
Preposition introducing a complement.
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'café' (masculine singular).
Common noun (masculine singular).

sentences.target: C'est celui dans lequel je dors.

translations.fr: C'est celui dans lequel je dors.
translations.en: It's the one I sleep in.
translations.de: Das ist der, in dem ich schlafe.
translations.zh-Hans: 这是我睡在里面的那个。
translations.ru: Это тот, в котором я сплю.
translations.pt: É aquele em que eu durmo.
translations.vi: Đó là cái tôi ngủ trong.
translations.nl: Het is degene waarin ik slaap.
translations.uk: Це той, у якому я сплю.
translations.hi: यह वही है जिसमें मैं सोता हूँ।
translations.nb: Det er den jeg sover i.
translations.sv: Det är den jag sover i.
translations.cs: To je ten, ve kterém spím.
translations.da: Det er den, jeg sover i.
translations.ja: それが私が寝ているやつだ。

tokens.explanation: Elided clitic form of demonstrative pronoun 'ce' before vowel; part of the copular expression.
3rd person singular present of 'être' used as a copula.
Demonstrative pronoun (masculine singular) referring to a specific item.
Preposition introducing a prepositional relative phrase.
Relative/interrogative pronoun (masculine singular) governed by the preposition 'dans'.
Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Present indicative, 1st person singular of 'dormir'.
